column1: # Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Columns: id  kind  language  url  ref  note
#   id       short unique slug (becomes tmp/code-eval/repos/<id> + out/<id>)
#   kind     "lang" (language-coverage repo) or "framework" (real app using a framework)
#   language the primary language the engine should detect
#   ref      tag/branch to pin (shallow); fetch falls back to default branch on failure
#   note     human description (for framework rows, names the framework + that it has real routes)
# Framework rows are REAL APPS (mostly the gothinkster "RealWorld" set) — they DEFINE routes,
# so they exercise the framework route resolvers. Framework LIBRARY repos do not (a lib
# defines the framework API, it doesn't call r.GET("/path", h)); use lib repos for lang
